scripts.name: 变量结构
音乐
scripts.content:
!function(){"use strict";try{if("undefined"!=typeof document){var e=document.createElement("style");e.appendChild(document.createTextNode('@charset "UTF-8";@import"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bitter:wght@400;700&family=Noto+Sans+SC:wght@300;400;500;700&display=swap";.st-audio-player-scope{--glow-bass:0px;--glow-opacity:.08;--base-glow-color:255,250,220;font-family:Bitter,Noto Sans SC,serif;color:#e2e8f0}.st-audio-player-scope *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}.st-audio-player-scope .icon{display:inline-block;width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:0;stroke:currentColor;fill:currentColor}.st-audio-player-scope .wrapper{position:relative;z-index:10000;pointer-events:none}.st-audio-player-scope .player{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172aa6,#1e293b80,#0f172aa6);backdrop-filter:blur(25px) saturate(160%);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(25px) saturate(160%);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);width:132px;min-width:108px;min-height:60px;box-shadow:0 10px 25px -5px #0009,inset 0 1px #ffffff0d;border-radius:8px;padding:8px;position:fixed;right:24px;top:100px;z-index:10001;transition:opacity .4s ease,transform .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);pointer-events:auto;overflow:hidden}.st-audio-player-scope .player__drag-handle{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:20px;cursor:move;z-index:5}.st-audio-player-scope .player__resize-handle{position:absolute;bottom:0;right:0;width:12px;height:12px;cursor:nwse-resize;z-index:6;background:linear-gradient(135deg,transparent 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.2) 50%)}.st-audio-player-scope .player:before{display:none}.st-audio-player-scope .logo-moon{position:absolute;top:8px;right:8px;color:#fffadc66;font-size:12px;z-index:20;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s ease}.st-audio-player-scope .logo-moon.is-active{color:#fffadc;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(255,250,220,.6))}.st-audio-player-scope .logo-moon.is-active .icon{fill:currentColor}.st-audio-player-scope .btn-minimize{position:absolute;top:8px;left:8px;background:transparent;border:none;color:#94a3b866;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;z-index:20;transition:color .3s}.st-audio-player-scope .btn-minimize:hover{color:#fffc}.st-audio-player-scope .player__top{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;position:relative;z-index:4;margin-top:3px}.st-audio-player-scope .player-cover{width:60px;height:60px;margin-bottom:6px;position:relative;z-index:1;border-radius:6px}.st-audio-player-scope .player-cover__item{background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:center;background-size:cover;width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:6px;position:absolute;left:0;top:0;box-shadow:0 4px 15px #0009;background-color:#0f172a}.st-audio-player-scope .player-controls{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:6px}.st-audio-player-scope .player-controls__item{display:inline-flex;font-size:14px;color:#94a3b8b3;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s ease}.st-audio-player-scope .player-controls__item:hover{color:#fffadc;transform:scale(1.1)}.st-audio-player-scope .player-controls__item.-xl{font-size:24px;color:#ffffffe6}.st-audio-player-scope .progress{width:100%}.st-audio-player-scope .progress__top{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:3px}.st-audio-player-scope .album-info{flex:1;overflow:hidden;padding-right:5px}.st-audio-player-scope .album-info__name{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.st-audio-player-scope .album-info__track{font-size:9px;color:#94a3b8b3;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.st-audio-player-scope .progress__duration{font-size:9px;color:#94a3b880}.st-audio-player-scope .progress__bar{height:3px;width:100%;cursor:pointer;background-color:#ffffff14;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:3px;position:relative}.st-audio-player-scope .progress__current{height:inherit;width:0%;background:#fffadc;border-radius:2px}.st-audio-player-scope .progress__time{font-size:9px;color:#94a3b880;text-align:right}.st-audio-player-scope .player-volume{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:8px;padding:0 2px}.st-audio-player-scope .volume-icon{font-size:12px;color:#94a3b8b3;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center}.st-audio-player-scope .volume-icon:hover{color:#fff}.st-audio-player-scope .volume-slider-container{flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center}.st-audio-player-scope .volume-slider{appearance:none;-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:3px;background:#ffffff1a;border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer}.st-audio-player-scope .volume-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{appearance:none;-webkit-appearance:none;width:10px;height:10px;background:#fffadc;border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 0 8px #fffadcb3;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid rgb(15,23,42);margin-top:-1px}.st-audio-player-scope .volume-slider::-moz-range-thumb{width:10px;height:10px;background:#fffadc;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgb(15,23,42);box-shadow:0 0 8px #fffadcb3;cursor:pointer}.st-audio-player-scope .mini-moon-container{position:fixed;bottom:100px;right:20px;width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;z-index:10005;cursor:move;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .4s,transform .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),box-shadow .2s ease;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(var(--base-glow-color),0)}.st-audio-player-scope .mini-moon-container .mini-cover{width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;background-size:cover;background-position:center;border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.8);outline:1px solid rgba(255,250,220,.3);box-shadow:0 0 15px #000c;animation:st-spin 12s linear infinite;animation-play-state:paused;transform-origin:center center}@keyframes st-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}.st-audio-player-scope.is-mini .player{opacity:0;transform:scale(.6) translateY(30px);pointer-events:none}.st-audio-player-scope.is-mini .mini-moon-container{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto;transform:scale(1) translateY(0)}.st-audio-player-scope.is-mini .mini-moon-container.playing .mini-cover{animation-play-state:running}@media screen and (max-width:600px){.st-audio-player-scope .player{width:108px;right:10px;top:80px;padding:6px}.st-audio-player-scope .player-cover{width:48px;height:48px}.st-audio-player-scope .player-controls{gap:8px}.st-audio-player-scope .player-controls__item{font-size:12px}.st-audio-player-scope regex_scripts.scriptName: Chỉ gửi cập nhật biến của 3 lầu mới nhất
Chỉ Định Dạng Chuỗi Tư Duy
[Làm Đẹp] Hoàn Thành Biến Hoàn Chỉnh - Thi Ý Dạ Không
regex_scripts.replaceString:
🌕 Trăng tròn ý trọn, suy nghĩ rõ ràng ✨
$1

regex_scripts.scriptName: [Mỹ Hóa] Đang Cập Nhật Biến - Dạ Không Thi Ý
regex_scripts.replaceString:
🌙 Trăng sáng dần lên, tâm tư lưu chuyển... ✦ ˚ ✦
$1

regex_scripts.scriptName: Ẩn thanh trạng thái với AI

regex_scripts.replaceString:
Quốc Sử Kỷ Yếu
Ngày ấy, thời đại tranh hùng, ngói vỡ sấm rền. Liệt quốc liên hoành hợp tung, khói lửa không dứt. Có cuồng khách áo vải nhập cục, khuấy động phong vân thiên hạ. Hậu thế bình phẩm: “Thương sinh nào có tội tình gì, duy chỉ một người này độc thanh.”
—— 《Thái Sử Công Thư · Vị Danh Liệt Truyện》
